title: Filing Addresses for Certain Forms Filed in Connection With a VAWA, T, or U Visa Application/Petition | USCIS
content:
## Filing Addresses for Certain Forms Filed in Connection With a VAWA, T, or U Visa Application/Petition
Alert : Before sending your package to USCIS, make sure that all the forms you have completed are the current acceptable edition. The current acceptable edition can be found under the Edition Date section listed on each form’s webpage. You can also find the edition date at the bottom of the page on the form and instructions. For each form that you are submitting, make sure that all pages are from the same form edition. If any of the form’s pages are from a different form edition, we may reject your form. Watch USCIS Forms: Download the most recent version! to see how to ensure your form is acceptable. For additional guidance on filing paper-based forms at the Lockbox and how to avoid or correct common errors before you file, please visit the Five Steps to File at the USCIS Lockbox webpage.
Use the table below to determine where you must file your 8 USC 1367 protections-related application, petition, or request based on your reason for filing, eligibility category, and where you live. We specify the eligibility categories that use these addresses on the following pages:
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-102, Application for Replacement/Initial Nonimmigrant Departure Document ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-131, Application for Travel Document, Parole Documents, and Arrival/Departure Records ;
- Form I-192, Application for Advance Permission to Enter as a Nonimmigrant ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-212, Application for Permission to Reapply for Admission into the United States After Deportation or Removal ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-290B, Notice of Appeal or Motion ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-360, Immigrant Petition for Amerasian, Widow(er) or Special Immigrant ;
- Filing Addresses for Form I-539, Application to Extend/Change Nonimmigrant Status ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-601, Application for Waiver of Grounds of Inadmissibility ;
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-765, Application for Employment Authorization ; and
- Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-824, Application for Action on an Approved Application or Petition .
Applications, petitions, or requests that are not mailed to the appropriate filing location may experience processing delays.
If you are filing any of the forms listed above in connection with VAWA, T nonimmigrant status, or U nonimmigrant status, and the direct filing address page directs you here, and you live in:
USCIS Elgin Lockbox U.S. Postal Service (USPS): USCIS Attn: 1367 P.O. Box 4205 Carol Stream, IL 60197-4205 FedEx, UPS, and DHL deliveries: USCIS Attn: 1367 (Box 4205) 2500 Westfield Drive Elgin, IL 60124-7836
